cases.expected_behavior: `python -m agent_mem_bridge --version` exits 0 with a package version.
cases.non_goal_guard: Does not claim PyPI, vendor-client, or external clean-room certification.
cases.purpose: Prove the installed/local package entrypoint can import and report a version.

cases.expected_behavior: MCP `list_tools` returns the documented 10 tools and no v0.20 tool.
cases.non_goal_guard: Does not add startup_packet, task_packet, plugin, watcher, or harness tools.
cases.purpose: Prove the real stdio MCP server exposes exactly the documented public surface.

cases.expected_behavior: `store` writes one demo memory and `recall` finds the same record with stdio provenance.
cases.non_goal_guard: Does not count direct MemoryStore calls as MCP round-trip evidence.
cases.purpose: Prove a tokened demo memory can round-trip through MCP stdio store and recall.
cases.query_or_command: MCP store/recall query: clean room adoption handoff v020-clean-room-stdio-token

evidence.command: python -m agent_mem_bridge first-run --client generic --namespace project:v020-clean-room --query clean room adoption handoff --example --format json

cases.expected_behavior: `first-run --format json --example` parses, stays manual-copy-only, and includes Task Brief.
cases.non_goal_guard: Does not write client config or claim runtime-specific plugin support.
cases.purpose: Prove first-run output is available as a placeholder-safe local CLI report.
cases.query_or_command: python -m agent_mem_bridge first-run --client generic --namespace project:v020-clean-room --query clean room adoption handoff --example --format json

evidence.command: python -m agent_mem_bridge task-brief --namespace project:v020-clean-room --query clean room adoption handoff --format json

cases.expected_behavior: `task-brief --format json` parses and includes used/review sections from the temp store.
cases.non_goal_guard: Does not mutate memory, promote records, or require AMH.
cases.purpose: Prove Task Brief output is available as a read-only local CLI report.
cases.query_or_command: python -m agent_mem_bridge task-brief --namespace project:v020-clean-room --query clean room adoption handoff --format json

cases.expected_behavior: No client config file, no live DB mutation, no non-demo durable writeback.
cases.non_goal_guard: Does not touch user/client config, live AMB home, watcher, scheduler, or AMH runtime.
cases.purpose: Prove the proof writes only explicit demo data into an isolated temp store.

first_run.command: python -m agent_mem_bridge first-run --client generic --namespace project:v020-clean-room --query clean room adoption handoff --example --format json

task_brief.command: python -m agent_mem_bridge task-brief --namespace project:v020-clean-room --query clean room adoption handoff --format json
